title: Build dashboard renderer for ScoreResultsReport
description: Add dedicated dashboard block renderer grouped by score, including prediction details, expandable trace display, and diagnostics panels for unresolved identifiers and failed predictions.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implementing dashboard renderer refactor per design plan: replace table with score-grouped cards, use IdentifierDisplay, restyle diagnostics panels, and keep traces collapsed by default via structured ScoreResultTrace expansion.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Applying follow-up UI refinement: remove score result ID from ScoreResultsReport rows and improve cost presentation from raw JSON to concise human-readable metrics (USD and token counts).

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Adjusting ScoreResultsReport explanation rendering to full-height content (no truncation/line clamp); explanations should grow naturally with content length.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Refining row metadata display: show status only for non-success results, and move cost rendering to final footer line after explanation/trace content.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Adjusting value badge semantics: remove green/red success/failure color coding from score result value pills; use neutral muted styling since correctness is unknown.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Removing top-level 'Failed Predictions' diagnostics panel from ScoreResultsReport UI; failures remain represented inline per result row only.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: UI tweak: reverse top-row alignment in ScoreResultsReport result cards so value pill is on the left above explanation, identifiers on the right.
